title: Kalavari Kodalu Kanaka Mahalakshmi
desc: A loving father seeks a marriage alliance for his beloved daughter but is rejected by his relatives. Soon, her wedding is fixed with a man who does not approve of her, leading her to face some issues.

title: Ennallo Vechina Hrudayam
desc: Tripura, a kind-hearted teacher, steps into the life of Bala, a former businessman left with brain damage after an accident, forming a bond that transforms their lives.

title: Gharana Mogudu
desc: Venkatesh learns that he is to inherit a business that his relatives plot to seize from him. However, while his aunt conspires to control him, he secretly plans her ruin.

title: Kongu Bangaram
desc: Jhansi Devi leads Ravi to Bhandari, hoping he changes his reckless ways to take charge of her business empire. A clash of personalities ensues, and soon turns to a battle for the family's future.

title: Kongu Bangaram
desc: Jhansi Devi leads Ravi to Bhandari, hoping he changes his reckless ways to take charge of her business empire. A clash of personalities ensues, and soon turns to a battle for the family's future.

title: Magamaha Raju
desc: After the sudden demise of his father, Raju, an unemployed youth, has to shoulder the safety and responsibility of his family.

title: Nindu Noorella Saavasam
desc: When an Indian Armed Force Major's wife passes away, her spirit stays in the house till the time she feels the ideal person to take care of her children has not arrived.

title: Padamati Sandhya Ragam
desc: After her mother's loss, Aadhya, who is under the care of Janaki, her aunt, is despised by Janaki's family because of her modern habits. Janaki tries hard to keep Aadhya happy.

title: Lakshmi Nivasam
desc: Lakshmi and Srinivas are a happily married couple who want to build their dream house. However, they must first navigate through familial problems, generational conflicts and financial struggles.

title: Meghasandesham
desc: A fire accident separates Bhoomi and Gagan from their respective fathers. While Bhoomi yearns to reunite with her family, Gagan hates his father, believing he abandoned him.

title: Chamanthi
desc: Chamanthi moves to the city with her mother after finding work as a servant in a politician's house. However, her life takes a turn when she marries the politician's son.

title: Jayam
desc: Ganga commences rigorous training under Rudra, a former boxer, aiming to protect her mother. Together, they confront their pasts, discovering fortitude and profound affection.

title: Jagadhatri
desc: Behind the facade of running an NGO for hearing and speech impaired children, the demure Jagadhatri Sanyal is, in reality, a fiery intelligence officer code-named JAS.

title: Auto Vijayashanthi
desc: Carrying the responsibilities of her family, Vijayashanti, a hardworking auto driver, comes across Chiranjeev who is neglected by his father.

title: Lakshmi Raave Maa Intiki
desc: The host interacts with women belonging to different walks of life about their personal and professional achievements and organises interesting games for their entertainment.

title: Karna
desc: The story of Karna, who becomes one of the most formidable warriors in the Mahabharata.

title: Gharana Mogudu
desc: Venkatesh learns that he is to inherit a business that his relatives plot to seize from him. However, while his aunt conspires to control him, he secretly plans her ruin.

title: Meghasandesham
desc: Apoorva is outraged by Nakshatra and Gorintaku's claims about Cherry's ghost haunting them. Meanwhile, Gagan pens a heartfelt letter to Bhoomi, expressing his feelings.

title: Jawan
desc: Driven by a personal vendetta, a man sets out to rectify the wrongs in the society to keep a promise made years ago.

title: Pooja
desc: Due to a familial dispute, Ramu is not allowed to marry his lady-love, Lalitha. He is then forced to marry Gouri, who struggles to win him over.

title: Teleshopping
desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Teleshopping
desc: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Mukku Pudaka
desc: Avani is overjoyed when Gowri transforms Archana back into Akshaya and seeks a promise from her, while Vedavathi's family proceeds with Maya and Srikar's wedding plans.

title: Srikaram Subhakaram
desc: A renowned astrologer gives out daily horoscopes and predicts the outcomes and changes in an individual's life based on planetary positions.

title: Omkaram
desc: A renowned astrologer predicts the future of the people and offers remedies to viewers suffering from problems in their personal and professional lives.

title: Aarogyame Mahayogam
desc: The host interacts with an expert who shares insightful tips and suggestions with viewers on maintaining a healthy lifestyle using traditional Indian techniques.

title: DJ: Duvvada Jagannadham
desc: Duvvada Jagannatham Sastry, an honest man, goes to great lengths to help other people. A police officer notices this quality of his and asks him to moonlight as a crime fighter.

title: Mukku Pudaka
desc: Avani, who works as a tour guide, does not wear a nose ring according to her lineage, but her future mother-in-law wants her to hold a fair, vow to the village deity and wear it on that day.

title: Ummadi Kutumbam
desc: Ananda Bhairavi, who is in search of a homely daughter-in-law, finds Saranya to be a perfect match. However, Saranya's younger sister's contrasting personality proves to be challenging for Ananda.

title: Deergha Sumangali Bhava
desc: Ahalya's romance with soldier Indra ends in tragedy. Fate intertwines her life with his brother Gowtham, promising new beginnings.

title: Gundamma Katha
desc: Geetha, constantly ridiculed for being overweight, is compelled to marry Ram due to unfortunate events, and strives to win his heart.
